title: Epic post about Eva at Metafilter Evageeks gets linked
display_title: Epic post about Eva at Metafilter Evageeks gets linked
wikitext:
[]: Epic post about Eva at Metafilter (Evageeks gets linked)             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Mon Feb 07, 2011 10:47 pm Don't know if this is the right forum, but the Metafilter blog has a huge megapost about Evangelion here: http://www.metafilter.com/100327/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Hideaki-Anno-Reborn-Again-and-Again Our own precious Evageeks gets some links! Anyway, I'm always interested in what the people in the other parts of the internet think about the franchise. And I wonder if any of you post there. (It costs money to post, so clearly I don't post there, because I use all my money on drugs and genderfluid hookers.) Either way, lots of links. And it reminds me I have to do my annual marathon soon. Swoon~

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Feb 07, 2011 11:06 pm EvaGeeks got linked. Whoa. Though, to be honest, I'm not sure who or what "MetaFilter" is and why they chose such a matter-of-fact manner to post this. I must explore this site more.... EDIT: Whoa! Someone wrote a comparative article before I did! I'd better get a little more serious about this.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Mon Feb 07, 2011 11:35 pm It's one of the most popular blogs around. Alexa ranks it in the top 2000 (global) and top 1000 (English-language sites). This is a site where a thread can get hundreds of posts within a 24 hour period. It's pretty active. But they post about virtually anything. Why I find this interesting and worthy of posting here is because this is pretty much an "Eva 101" post for people who aren't really big into the otaku thing. It is interesting for me to see the reactions from people who aren't diehard Eva freaks.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Feb 07, 2011 11:53 pm I'm offended that BrikHaus wasn't mentioned in that post.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Feb 08, 2011 5:05 am So we're important now or something?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Feb 08, 2011 5:10 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: EDIT: Whoa! Someone wrote a comparative article before I did! I'd better get a little more serious about this.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Feb 08, 2011 5:14 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: 2.22 has been out for a long time now, you shouldn´t be too surprised.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Feb 08, 2011 5:44 am ^ I am confused.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Feb 08, 2011 8:18 am I'm just amused to see that the reVolution was left out of the 'see more here' list. Expect about 7 angry posts over there from 3 neckbeards decrying the tragic injustice of it all.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 08, 2011 8:46 am BrikHaus wrote: I'm offended that BrikHaus wasn't mentioned in that post.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Feb 08, 2011 8:54 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I'm offended that THAT SITE was linked, but MY SITE was not.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 08, 2011 10:12 am InstrumentalityOne : No, Monkey's talking about a certain Guy Fawkes mask-wearing Banned member. NemZ : Eh, let them cry all the injustice they want. Clearly it means that site isn't as comprehensive as we are. O7-chan : Very cool news, although I haven't really heard of metafilter before. Still, some publicity is better than none. (Nice to see EvaCommentary get a mention too!)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 08, 2011 10:45 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: By THAT SITE do you mean THAT IMAGEBOARD?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Feb 08, 2011 11:27 am ^ The Lord hath spoken.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Feb 08, 2011 4:29 pm Whoah, that's already gotten like a ton of replies... I'm still not quite getting what the site's all about... it's just another blog?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Feb 08, 2011 5:22 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: 2.22 has been out for a long time now, you shouldn´t be too surprised.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Wed Feb 09, 2011 7:41 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: I'm still not quite getting what the site's all about... it's just another blog?
